utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 sections. Now check if each is fully specified per item: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (address, details, price, and even viewing time) — fully specified. 2) financing: includes financing solution with terms (mortgage type, loan amount, down payment, interest rate, monthly payment, fees, status) — fully specified. 3) legal_services: includes legal services with costs (company, contact, service, cost) — fully specified. 4) moving_services: moving arrangements with costs (company, contact, service, cost, timeline) — fully specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services (electricity, gas, internet, water, and a survey/inspection with providers, fees, monthly costs) — fully specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown (price, down payment, upfront costs, utility setup fees, moving, monthly mortgage, monthly utilities, total upfront) — fully specified. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final solution includes: a purchase property matching 'Family House' at CAD $650K; financing 'First-Time Buyer Mortgage'; legal 'Basic Legal Package'; moving 'Standard Moving'; and a survey that aligns with 'Basic Survey' at CAD $300.
